mapper.select: WITH RAW_SUMS AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC(#{timeBucket}, CREATED_AT), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS BUCKET, SYMBOL, COUNT(TRADE_ID) AS TRADECOUNT, SUM(QTY) AS TOTALQTY, SUM(PRICE * QTY) AS RAW_VOL, SUM(PRICE) AS SUM_PRICE FROM TRADES WHERE CREATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND CREATED_AT <= #{endDate} GROUP BY 1, 2 ) SELECT R.BUCKET AS BUCKET, SUM(R.TRADECOUNT) AS TRADECOUNT, SUM(R.TOTALQTY) AS TOTALQTY, CAST(SUM(R.SUM_PRICE) / NULLIF(SUM(R.TRADECOUNT), 0) AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS AVGPRICE, CAST(SUM(R.RAW_VOL / POWER(10, COALESCE(M.PRICE_DECIMALS, 2))) AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS TOTALVOLUME FROM RAW_SUMS R LEFT JOIN MARKETS M ON R.SYMBOL = M.SYMBOL GROUP BY R.BUCKET ORDER BY R.BUCKET DESC

WITH RAW_SUMS AS ( SELECT SYMBOL, SUM(PRICE * QTY) AS RAW_VOL FROM TRADES GROUP BY SYMBOL ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(R.RAW_VOL / POWER(10, COALESCE(M.PRICE_DECIMALS, 2))), 0.0) FROM RAW_SUMS R LEFT JOIN MARKETS M ON R.SYMBOL = M.SYMBOL
SELECT * FROM TRADES WHERE SYMBOL = #{symbol} AND CREATED_AT < #{cutoff} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM TRADES WHERE SYMBOL = #{symbol} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC LIMIT 1
